title: Positive flow: Navigating through property listings
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Scroll through the property listings to view all 1119 results. | Click on one of the property listings to view more details.
expected_result: The app should display a list of rental properties in Koramangala. | The user should be able to scroll through all 1119 results. | Clicking on a property listing should navigate the user to a more detailed view of the property.

title: Negative flow: No internet connection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Simulate a no internet connection scenario.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating no internet connection.

title: Boundary validation: Maximum number of results
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Check if the app can handle the maximum number of results (1119).
expected_result: The app should display all 1119 results without any issues.

title: Toggles state: Alert creation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Click on the 'Create Alert' button. | Verify that the alert is successfully created.
expected_result: The 'Create Alert' button should toggle the alert creation state.

title: Usability: Sorting properties
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Click on the 'SORT' button. | Select a sorting option and verify that the properties are sorted accordingly.
expected_result: The 'SORT' button should allow the user to sort the property listings.

title: Accessibility: Screen reader support
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Use a screen reader to navigate through the screen and verify that all elements are accessible.
expected_result: All elements on the screen should be accessible via a screen reader.

title: Data persistence: Property details persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen displaying rental properties in Koramangala. | Click on a property listing to view more details. | Close the app and reopen it to verify that the property details are still persisted.
expected_result: The property details should be persisted across app sessions.
